title: Carryon
description: Hold 3d Items or use them for decoration!
body:
Changes items to be 3d in hand. also has eating/drinking animations
## Current modeled items include:
- All food and drinks
- All buckets
- Goat horn
- Spyglass remodel
- All tools/weapons
- Arrows
- Eggs
- Balls
- Torches and lanterns


I also retextured most of the sprites/blocks for the items listed above (also fish entities)

<details>
<summary>Recommended mods</summary>

- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) (3rd person eating, Lantern holding)
- [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) (NEA Lantern holding, 2d Shield toggles)
- [Real Arrow Tip](https://modrinth.com/mod/real-arrow-tip) (Correct Arrow in Bow/Crossbow)
- [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)/[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) (Custom Trident, Arrow, Shield models)

</details>
